ksa_text: Skill in conducting AI conformity assessments under the EU AI Act, including risk classification determination, technical documentation evaluation, and compliance assessment against applicable high-risk AI system requirements.

ddat.top_element_label: Capability building for digital, data and technology

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA RC-S-008 (Risk and Compliance/Skill) is excluded as out_of_scope (composite 0.600, highest: EU AI Act at 0.600). Core signal: 1, OOS signals: 0, seniority: appropriate. Risk and Compliance at this signal level does not meet inclusion threshold for AI/ML Specialist (DoD).

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency identified. Exclude consistent with out_of_scope classification, composite 0.600, and Risk and Compliance (RC) handling. Decision stands.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence challenge the exclusion of this Risk and Compliance KSA (composite 0.600)?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Market analysis does not surface this Risk and Compliance competency as a standard AI/ML Specialist (DoD) requirement. Exclusion consistent with the role's technical focus.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Exclusion upheld. Market evidence consistent with exclusion. Final decision: exclude.
